mermaidSyntax:
graph LR subgraph Screening["📋 Screening Period
Weeks -4 to 0"] A[Informed Consent
Week -4] --> B[Eligibility Assessment
Weeks -3 to -1] B --> C[Baseline Measurements
Week -1 to 0] end subgraph Treatment["💊 Treatment Period
Weeks 0-52"] C --> D{Randomization
Week 0} D -->|Treatment Arm| E[Drug X 10mg Daily
Weeks 0-52] D -->|Control Arm| F[Placebo Daily
Weeks 0-52] E --> G[Follow-up Visits
Weeks 4, 12, 26, 52] F --> G G --> H[Primary Endpoint
Assessment Week 52] end subgraph Extension["🔄 Extension Period
Weeks 52-104"] H --> I[Optional Open-Label
Drug X for All
Weeks 52-104] end subgraph Safety["🛡️ Safety Follow-up"] H --> J[Safety Assessment
Week 56] end style D fill:#f59e0b,stroke:#d97706,color:#000 style E fill:#3b82f6,stroke:#1e40af,color:#fff style F fill:#ef4444,stroke:#b91c1c,color:#fff style H fill:#10b981,stroke:#047857,color:#fff style I fill:#6b7280,stroke:#4b5563,color:#fff,stroke-dasharray: 5 5 style J fill:#f97316,stroke:#ea580c,color:#fff

failures.description: Syntax errors: Expected timeline but got flowchart; Contains smart quotes (curly quotes) — Mermaid requires straight quotes
failures.suggestedFix: Fix Mermaid syntax — check bracket matching and type declarations
